added_claims: Home medication includes aspirin 81 mg daily

reasons: Evidence transcript span 'aspirin eighty-one milligrams daily' directly supports the claim.
Aspirin 81 mg is not among the previously listed home medications (atenolol, rosuvastatin, lisinopril), so no duplication.
Home medications belong in the Subjective section, which is the correct placement.
